# Morgonkoll: Ericsson missar estimat – finansprofil begärd häktad

**Feed**: dagen-med-di  
**Published**: 2026-04-17  
**Market Sentiment**: Mixed

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

This is a Swedish morning markets briefing (Morgonkoll, 17 April 2026). The dominant story is Ericsson reporting Q1 results below estimates (adjusted EBITDA 5.6bn vs 5.9bn expected, margin 0.2pp under forecast, declining sales), alongside news that finance profile Günther Mårder was detained on suspicion of gross insider trading. The episode also notes new Wall Street records, a flat Stockholm open, mostly lower Asian markets, Brent crude at $98, and geopolitical ceasefire developments.
